data.title: Trump broke through 3.8 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 35.56%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that Trump has broken through 3.8 USDT and is currently trading at 3.86 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 35.56%.

data.title: Iranian Official Comments on Tehran Explosion
data.description: Iran's Supreme National Security Council Secretary, Ali Larijani, addressed the recent explosion near a gathering site in Tehran. According to Jin10, Larijani stated that the attack was driven by fear and desperation, suggesting that a strong entity would not resort to bombing during a parade. He emphasized that the perpetrators are on the brink of collapse.

data.title: BitMart will be listed on Unitas Labs ($UP)
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Unitas Labs ($UP) on March 13th at 19:00 (UTC+8), with the $UP/USDT trading pair available. Unitas aims to build a global savings layer for digital assets, providing users with transparent USD-denominated returns through market-neutral/Delta-neutral on-chain strategies.

data.title: U.S. National Debt Reaches $38.88 Trillion Amid Concerns Over War Spending
data.description: The U.S. national debt has increased by approximately $543 billion over the past four months, reaching a total of $38.88 trillion, as reported by the U.S. Treasury Department. According to NS3.AI, this significant rise in debt has sparked concerns among financial analysts and policymakers. Former Congressman Ron Paul has issued a warning that spending related to potential conflicts with Iran could exacerbate debt pressures and lead to a more severe economic downturn. The growing national debt continues to be a critical issue for the U.S. economy, with implications for future fiscal policies and economic stability.

data.title: China's Credit Expansion Surpasses Expectations in February
data.description: China's credit growth in February exceeded expectations compared to the previous year, driven by consistent lending activities despite a slowdown in government bond sales. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the unexpected rise in credit expansion during the month. The increase in lending suggests a stable financial environment, even as government bond sales experienced a decline. This development indicates a potential shift in China's economic strategy, focusing on maintaining credit flow to support economic stability. The data reflects the country's efforts to balance lending with fiscal measures, aiming to sustain growth amid global economic uncertainties.

data.title: STOCKS | Emerging Market Stocks Face Weekly Losses Amid High Oil Prices
data.description: Emerging market stocks are on track for a second consecutive week of losses, influenced by Brent oil prices remaining above $100 per barrel. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the impact of the ongoing Middle East conflict on global markets. The sustained high oil prices are contributing to economic pressures in these regions, affecting investor sentiment and market performance. Analysts are closely monitoring the situation, as geopolitical tensions continue to drive volatility in the energy sector, which in turn affects stock markets worldwide. The current scenario underscores the interconnectedness of global markets and the influence of geopolitical events on economic stability.

data.title: South Korea Plans Additional Budget to Mitigate Oil Price Impact
data.description: South Korea's Finance Minister has announced plans to formulate an additional budget aimed at supporting groups affected by rising oil prices. According to Jin10, the government is taking steps to alleviate the economic strain caused by fluctuating energy costs. The initiative is part of broader efforts to stabilize the economy and provide relief to sectors most impacted by the volatility in oil markets. The Finance Minister emphasized the importance of targeted financial measures to ensure that vulnerable communities receive adequate support during this period of uncertainty.

data.title: Trump said Iran was "about to surrender" during a G7 call.
data.description: Three G7 officials said that Trump told G7 leaders in a virtual meeting on Wednesday that Iran was “about to surrender.” But 24 hours later, Iran’s new Supreme Leader issued his first public statement, vowing to continue the fight. Trump’s assessment contradicts the complex reality that the Iranian regime has shown no signs of imminent surrender or collapse and is attempting to gain more leverage by blocking the Strait of Hormuz. In the G7 call Wednesday morning, Trump boasted about the results of Operation Epic Fury and told allies, “I’ve cleared a cancer that was threatening all of us.” While claiming Iran was about to surrender, he also implied that no Iranian officials capable of making that decision were still alive. According to two officials familiar with the call, Trump said, “Nobody knows who the leader is, so nobody can declare surrender.” (Jin Shi)

data.title: India-U.S. Trade Agreement Faces Delays
data.description: The anticipated trade agreement between India and the United States is expected to be delayed by several months, according to sources familiar with the matter. According to Jin10, the delay comes amid ongoing negotiations and discussions between the two nations. The agreement, which aims to enhance trade relations and economic cooperation, was initially expected to be finalized sooner. However, complexities in the negotiation process have led to the postponement. Both countries continue to work towards resolving outstanding issues to reach a mutually beneficial agreement.

data.title: Public Companies Increase Bitcoin Holdings by 8% in Q1 2026
data.description: Publicly traded companies have significantly increased their Bitcoin holdings in the first quarter of 2026. According to NS3.AI, these companies have accumulated a total of 62,000 BTC during this period. This figure represents an 8% increase compared to the amount purchased in the fourth quarter of 2025. The growing interest in Bitcoin among public companies highlights the continued confidence in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Luxury Movie Experience Gains Popularity in New York
data.description: Metro Private Cinema in New York is transforming the traditional movie night into a luxurious private event. Bloomberg posted on X, the cinema offers both first-run and classic films, accompanied by drinks and multicourse meals. This shift towards exclusivity raises the question of whether a smaller audience enhances the viewing experience.

data.title: Iran to Repatriate Bodies of 84 Naval Officers Killed in U.S. Submarine Attack
data.description: Iran is set to repatriate the bodies of 84 naval officers who were killed in a U.S. submarine attack, according to Jin10. The incident has heightened tensions between the two nations, with Iran's foreign embassy sources confirming the return of the deceased officers. The attack underscores ongoing geopolitical frictions in the region, as both countries navigate complex diplomatic relations. The repatriation process is expected to proceed in the coming days, marking a somber moment for the families and the nation.

data.title: Polymarket's first Shanghai weather forecast: Nearly 100% probability of a high of 13°C, up 55% intraday.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the probability of Polymarket's prediction of a high of 13 degrees Celsius in Shanghai on March 13th has risen to 99%, an increase of 55% within the day. Previously, Polymarket launched weather forecasts for Shanghai and Hong Kong yesterday; however, due to Wunderground's inability to provide historical weather data for Hong Kong, the Hong Kong-related forecasts have been removed today. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the forecast market, anticipating changes before pricing.

data.title: UK Chancellor Invites Competition Authority to Fuel Station Operators Meeting
data.description: UK Chancellor of the Exchequer, Rachel Reeves, has extended an invitation to the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) to participate in a meeting with fuel station operators. According to Jin10, this move aims to address concerns regarding fuel pricing and market competition. The meeting is expected to facilitate discussions on ensuring fair pricing practices and enhancing transparency within the fuel retail sector. The involvement of the CMA underscores the government's commitment to maintaining competitive market conditions and protecting consumer interests.

data.title: New York's Job Market for Recent Graduates Faces Challenges
data.description: The job market for recent college graduates in New York is experiencing a downturn, affecting what was once a promising aspect of the city's economy. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced by new graduates as they enter the workforce. The decline in job opportunities is contributing to broader economic concerns in the region. As the situation unfolds, stakeholders are closely monitoring the impact on the city's economic landscape.

data.title: The Dubai TOKEN 2049 Summit is tentatively scheduled to be postponed to April 2027.
data.description: According to market sources, the organizers of the Dubai TOKEN2049 Summit plan to postpone the event to April 21-22, 2027. The conference was originally scheduled to be held from April 29 to 30, 2026, but the recent conflict in the Middle East has spread to Dubai.

data.title: Binance to Expand Monitoring Tag to Include Additional Tokens in March 2026
data.description:
Binance, a leading centralized exchange (CEX), has announced plans to extend its monitoring tag to include several additional tokens on March 13, 2026. According to BWEnews, the tokens to be included are ATA, A2Z, FIO, GTC, NTRN, PHB, QI, and RDNT. This move is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to enhance its monitoring capabilities and ensure compliance with regulatory standards.

The market capitalization for these tokens varies, with A2Z, FIO, and RDNT each having a market cap of $8 million. GTC and NTRN both have a market cap of $10 million, while QI leads with $14 million. PHB and ATA also have a market cap of $10 million and $12 million, respectively.

This development is expected to impact the trading and monitoring processes on the platform, as Binance continues to adapt to the evolving cryptocurrency landscape. The inclusion of these tokens under the monitoring tag signifies Binance's commitment to maintaining a secure and transparent trading environment for its users.

data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance added ATA, A2Z, FIO, GTC, NTRN, PHB, QI, and RDNT to its monitoring tags on March 13, 2026.
